ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱلذَّٰرِيَـٰتِ ذَرْوًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلذَّٲرِيَـٰتِ ذَرْوًا ١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَالذّٰرِيٰتِ ذَرۡوًا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: By the [winds] scattering [dust], dispersing [it]
ayahs.transliteration: Waz-zaariyaati zarwaa

ayahs.textUthmani: فَٱلْحَـٰمِلَـٰتِ وِقْرًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱلْحَـٰمِلَـٰتِ وِقْرًا ٢
ayahs.textIndopak: فَالۡحٰمِلٰتِ وِقۡرًا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And the [clouds] carrying a load [of water]
ayahs.transliteration: Falhaamilaati wiqraa

ayahs.textUthmani: فَٱلْجَـٰرِيَـٰتِ يُسْرًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱلْجَـٰرِيَـٰتِ يُسْرًا ٣
ayahs.textIndopak: فَالۡجٰرِيٰتِ يُسۡرًا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And the ships sailing with ease
ayahs.transliteration: Faljaariyaati yusraa

ayahs.textUthmani: فَٱلْمُقَسِّمَـٰتِ أَمْرًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱلْمُقَسِّمَـٰتِ أَمْرًا ٤
ayahs.textIndopak: فَالۡمُقَسِّمٰتِ اَمۡرًا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And the [angels] apportioning [each] matter,
ayahs.transliteration: Falmuqassimaati amraa

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقٌ ٥
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّمَا تُوۡعَدُوۡنَ لَصَادِقٌ ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, what you are promised is true.
ayahs.transliteration: Innamaa too'adoona la-saadiq

ayahs.textUthmani: وَإِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ لَوَٰقِعٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ لَوَٲقِعٌ ٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّاِنَّ الدِّيۡنَ لوَاقِعٌ ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: And indeed, the recompense is to occur.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-innad deena la-waaqi'

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْحُبُكِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْحُبُكِ ٧
ayahs.textIndopak: وَالسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ الۡحُـبُكِ ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: By the heaven containing pathways,
ayahs.transliteration: Wassamaaa'i zaatil hubuk

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّكُمْ لَفِى قَوْلٍ مُّخْتَلِفٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّكُمْ لَفِى قَوْلٍ مُّخْتَلِفٍ ٨
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّـكُمۡ لَفِىۡ قَوۡلٍ مُّخۡتَلِفٍ ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, you are in differing speech.
ayahs.transliteration: Innakum lafee qawlim mukhtalif

ayahs.textUthmani: يُؤْفَكُ عَنْهُ مَنْ أُفِكَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يُؤْفَكُ عَنْهُ مَنْ أُفِكَ ٩
ayahs.textIndopak: يُّـؤۡفَكُ عَنۡهُ مَنۡ اُفِكَ ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: Deluded away from it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is he who is deluded.
ayahs.transliteration: Yu'faku 'anhu man ufik

ayahs.textUthmani: قُتِلَ ٱلْخَرَّٰصُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قُتِلَ ٱلْخَرَّٲصُونَ ١٠
ayahs.textIndopak: قُتِلَ الۡخَـرّٰصُوۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Destroyed are the misinformers
ayahs.transliteration: Qutilal kharraasoon

ayahs.textUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍ سَاهُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍ سَاهُونَ ١١
ayahs.textIndopak: الَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ فِىۡ غَمۡرَةٍ سَاهُوۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Who are within a flood [of confusion] and heedless.
ayahs.transliteration: Allazeena hum fee ghamratin saahoon

ayahs.textUthmani: يَسْـَٔلُونَ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَسْــَٔلُونَ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ ١٢
ayahs.textIndopak: يَسۡـَٔــلُوۡنَ اَيَّانَ يَوۡمُ الدِّيۡنِؕ‏
ayahs.translation: They ask, "When is the Day of Recompense?"
ayahs.transliteration: Yas'aloona ayyaana yawmud Deen

ayahs.textUthmani: يَوْمَ هُمْ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ يُفْتَنُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَ هُمْ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ يُفْتَنُونَ ١٣
ayahs.textIndopak: يَوۡمَ هُمۡ عَلَى النَّارِ يُفۡتَنُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: [It is] the Day they will be tormented over the Fire.
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma hum 'alan naari yuftanoon

ayahs.textUthmani: ذُوقُوا۟ فِتْنَتَكُمْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ذُوقُواْ فِتْنَتَكُمْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ ١٤
ayahs.textIndopak: ذُوۡقُوۡا فِتۡنَتَكُمۡؕ هٰذَا الَّذِىۡ كُنۡتُمۡ بِهٖ تَسۡتَعۡجِلُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: [And will be told], "Taste your torment. This is that for which you were impatient."
ayahs.transliteration: Zooqoo fitnatakum haa-zal lazee kuntum bihee tas-ta'jiloon

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ ١٥
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ فِىۡ جَنّٰتٍ وَّعُيُوۡنٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and springs,
ayahs.transliteration: Innal muttaqeena fee jannaatinw Wa-'uyoon

ayahs.textUthmani: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحْسِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَـٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ‌ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُواْ قَبْلَ ذَٲلِكَ مُحْسِنِينَ ١٦
ayahs.textIndopak: اٰخِذِيۡنَ مَاۤ اٰتٰٮهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ​ؕ اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا قَبۡلَ ذٰلِكَ مُحۡسِنِيۡنَؕ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Accepting what their Lord has given them. Indeed, they were before that doers of good.
ayahs.transliteration: Aakhizeena maaa aataahum Rabbuhum; innahum kaanoo qabla zaalika muhsineen

ayahs.textUthmani: كَانُوا۟ قَلِيلًا مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ مَا يَهْجَعُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَانُواْ قَلِيلاً مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ مَا يَهْجَعُونَ ١٧
ayahs.textIndopak: كَانُوۡا قَلِيۡلًا مِّنَ الَّيۡلِ مَا يَهۡجَعُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: They used to sleep but little of the night,
ayahs.transliteration: kaanoo qaleelam minal laili maa yahja'oon

ayahs.textUthmani: وَبِٱلْأَسْحَارِ هُمْ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَبِٱلْأَسْحَارِ هُمْ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ ١٨
ayahs.textIndopak: وَبِالۡاَسۡحَارِ هُمۡ يَسۡتَغۡفِرُوۡنَ‏

words.translation: And in the hours before dawn

ayahs.translation: And in the hours before dawn they would ask forgiveness,
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-bilashaari hum yastaghfiroon

ayahs.textUthmani: وَفِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفِىٓ أَمْوَٲلِهِمْ حَقٌّ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ ١٩
ayahs.textIndopak: وَفِىۡۤ اَمۡوَالِهِمۡ حَقٌّ لِّلسَّآٮِٕلِ وَالۡمَحۡرُوۡمِ‏
ayahs.translation: And from their properties was [given] the right of the [needy] petitioner and the deprived.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-feee amwaalihim haqqul lissaaa'ili walmahroom

ayahs.textUthmani: وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ءَايَـٰتٌ لِّلْمُوقِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ءَايَـٰتٌ لِّلْمُوقِنِينَ ٢٠
ayahs.textIndopak: وَفِى الۡاَرۡضِ اٰيٰتٌ لِّلۡمُوۡقِنِيۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And on the earth are signs for the certain [in faith]
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-fil ardi aayaatul lilmooqineen

ayahs.textUthmani: وَفِىٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ أَفَلَا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفِىٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ‌ۚ أَفَلَا تُبْصِرُونَ ٢١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَفِىۡۤ اَنۡفُسِكُمۡ​ؕ اَفَلَا تُبۡصِرُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And in yourselves. Then will you not see?
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-feee anfusikum; afalaa tubsiroon

ayahs.textUthmani: وَفِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزْقُكُمْ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزْقُكُمْ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ ٢٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَفِى السَّمَآءِ رِزۡقُكُمۡ وَمَا تُوۡعَدُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And in the heaven is your provision and whatever you are promised.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-fis samaaa'i rizqukum Wa-maa too'adoon

ayahs.textUthmani: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقٌّ مِّثْلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمْ تَنطِقُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقٌّ مِّثْلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمْ تَنطِقُونَ ٢٣
ayahs.textIndopak: فَوَرَبِّ السَّمَآءِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ اِنَّهٗ لَحَـقٌّ مِّثۡلَ مَاۤ اَنَّكُمۡ تَنۡطِقُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Then by the Lord of the heaven and earth, indeed, it is truth - just as [sure as] it is that you are speaking.
ayahs.transliteration: Fawa-Rabbis samaaa'i wal-ardi innahoo lahaqqum misla maa annakum tantiqoon

ayahs.textUthmani: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: هَلْ أَتَـٰكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٲهِيمَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ ٢٤
ayahs.textIndopak: هَلۡ اَتٰٮكَ حَدِيۡثُ ضَيۡفِ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ الۡمُكۡرَمِيۡنَ​ۘ‏
ayahs.translation: Has there reached you the story of the honored guests of Abraham? -
ayahs.transliteration: Hal ataaka hadeesu daifi Ibraaheemal mukrameen

ayahs.textUthmani: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمًا ۖ قَالَ سَلَـٰمٌ قَوْمٌ مُّنكَرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ دَخَلُواْ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُواْ سَلَـٰمًا‌ۖ قَالَ سَلَـٰمٌ قَوْمٌ مُّنكَرُونَ ٢٥
ayahs.textIndopak: اِذۡ دَخَلُوۡا عَلَيۡهِ فَقَالُوۡا سَلٰمًا​ؕ قَالَ سَلٰمٌ ۚ قَوۡمٌ مُّنۡكَرُوۡنَ​‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: When they entered upon him and said, "[We greet you with] peace." He answered, "[And upon you] peace; [you are] a people unknown."
ayahs.transliteration: Iz dakhaloo 'alaihi faqaaloo salaaman qaala salaamun qawmum munkaroon

ayahs.textUthmani: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجْلٍ سَمِينٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجْلٍ سَمِينٍ ٢٦
ayahs.textIndopak: فَرَاغَ اِلٰٓى اَهۡلِهٖ فَجَآءَ بِعِجۡلٍ سَمِيۡنٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Then he went to his family and came with a fat [roasted] calf.
ayahs.transliteration: Faraagha ilaaa ahlihee fajaaa'a bi'ijlin sameen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَقَرَّبَهُۥٓ إِلَيْهِمْ قَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَقَرَّبَهُۥٓ إِلَيْهِمْ قَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ ٢٧
ayahs.textIndopak: فَقَرَّبَهٗۤ اِلَيۡهِمۡ قَالَ اَلَا تَاۡكُلُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And placed it near them; he said, "Will you not eat?"
ayahs.transliteration: Faqarrabahooo ilaihim qaala alaa taakuloon

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةً ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِيمٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةً‌ۖ قَالُواْ لَا تَخَفْ‌ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِيمٍ ٢٨
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاَوۡجَسَ مِنۡهُمۡ خِيۡفَةً ​ؕ قَالُوۡا لَا تَخَفۡ​ ؕ وَبَشَّرُوۡهُ بِغُلٰمٍ عَلِيۡمٍ‏

words.translation: and they gave him glad tidings

ayahs.translation: And he felt from them apprehension. They said, "Fear not," and gave him good tidings of a learned boy.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-awjasa minhum khee-fatan qaaloo laa takhaf Wa-bashsharoohu bighulaamin 'aleem

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَقْبَلَتِ ٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ فِى صَرَّةٍ فَصَكَّتْ وَجْهَهَا وَقَالَتْ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَقْبَلَتِ ٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ فِى صَرَّةٍ فَصَكَّتْ وَجْهَهَا وَقَالَتْ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٌ ٢٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاَقۡبَلَتِ امۡرَاَتُهٗ فِىۡ صَرَّةٍ فَصَكَّتۡ وَجۡهَهَا وَقَالَتۡ عَجُوۡزٌ عَقِيۡمٌ‏
ayahs.translation: And his wife approached with a cry [of alarm] and struck her face and said, "[I am] a barren old woman!"
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-aqbalatim ra-atuhoo fee sarratin fasakkat wajhahaa Wa-qaalat 'ajoozun 'aqeem

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالُوا۟ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُواْ كَذَٲلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ‌ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٣٠
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالُوۡا كَذٰلِكِ ۙ قَالَ رَبُّكِ​ؕ اِنَّهٗ هُوَ الۡحَكِيۡمُ الۡعَلِيۡمُ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: They said, "Thus has said your Lord; indeed, He is the Wise, the Knowing."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaaloo kazaaliki qaala Rabbuki innahoo huwal hakeemul 'aleem

ayahs.textUthmani: ۞ قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ۞ قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ ٣١
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ فَمَا خَطۡبُكُمۡ اَيُّهَا الۡمُرۡسَلُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers?"
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala famaa khatbukum ayyuhal mursaloon

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ ٣٢
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالُـوۡۤا اِنَّاۤ اُرۡسِلۡنَاۤ اِلٰى قَوۡمٍ مُّجۡرِمِيۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals
ayahs.transliteration: Qaalooo innaaa ursilnaaa ilaa qawmim mujrimeen

ayahs.textUthmani: لِنُرْسِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن طِينٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لِنُرْسِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن طِينٍ ٣٣
ayahs.textIndopak: لِنُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ حِجَارَةً مِّنۡ طِيۡنٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: To send down upon them stones of clay,
ayahs.transliteration: Linursila 'alaihim hijaa-ratam min teen

ayahs.textUthmani: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُسْرِفِينَ ٣٤
ayahs.textIndopak: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِنۡدَ رَبِّكَ لِلۡمُسۡرِفِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Marked in the presence of your Lord for the transgressors."
ayahs.transliteration: Musawwamatan 'inda rabbika lilmusrifeen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَخْرَجْنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَخْرَجْنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ٣٥
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاَخۡرَجۡنَا مَنۡ كَانَ فِيۡهَا مِنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: So We brought out whoever was in them [i.e., the cities] of the believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-akhrajnaa man kaana feehaa minal mu'mineen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَمَا وَجَدْنَا فِيهَا غَيْرَ بَيْتٍ مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَمَا وَجَدْنَا فِيهَا غَيْرَ بَيْتٍ مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ ٣٦
ayahs.textIndopak: فَمَا وَجَدۡنَا فِيۡهَا غَيۡرَ بَيۡتٍ مِّنَ الۡمُسۡلِمِيۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And We found not within them other than a [single] house of Muslims.
ayahs.transliteration: Famaa wajadnaa feehaa ghaira baitim minal muslimeen

ayahs.textUthmani: وَتَرَكْنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَةً لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَرَكْنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَةً لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ ٣٧
ayahs.textIndopak: وَتَرَكۡنَا فِيۡهَاۤ اٰيَةً لِّـلَّذِيۡنَ يَخَافُوۡنَ الۡعَذَابَ الۡاَلِيۡمَؕ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And We left therein a sign for those who fear the painful punishment.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-taraknaa feehaaa aayatal lillazeena yakhaafoonal 'azaabal aleem

ayahs.textUthmani: وَفِى مُوسَىٰٓ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفِى مُوسَىٰٓ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ ٣٨
ayahs.textIndopak: وَفِىۡ مُوۡسٰۤی اِذۡ اَرۡسَلۡنٰهُ اِلٰى فِرۡعَوۡنَ بِسُلۡطٰنٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ‏
ayahs.translation: And in Moses [was a sign], when We sent him to Pharaoh with clear authority.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-fee Moosaaa iz arsalnaahu ilaa Fir'awna bisultaa-nim mubeen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكْنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَـٰحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكْنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَـٰحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ ٣٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَتَوَلّٰى بِرُكۡنِهٖ وَقَالَ سٰحِرٌ اَوۡ مَجۡنُوۡنٌ‏
ayahs.translation: But he turned away with his supporters and said, "A magician or a madman."
ayahs.transliteration: Fatawalla biruknihee Wa-qaala saahirun aw majnoon

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذْنَـٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذْنَـٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌ ٤٠
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاَخَذۡنٰهُ وَجُنُوۡدَهٗ فَنَبَذۡنٰهُمۡ فِى الۡيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيۡمٌؕ‏
ayahs.translation: So We took him and his soldiers and cast them into the sea, and he was blameworthy.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-akhaznaahu Wa-junoo-dahoo fanabaznaahum fil yammi Wa-huwa muleem

ayahs.textUthmani: وَفِى عَادٍ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلْعَقِيمَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفِى عَادٍ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلْعَقِيمَ ٤١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَفِىۡ عَادٍ اِذۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمُ الرِّيۡحَ الۡعَقِيۡمَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And in ʿAad [was a sign], when We sent against them the barren wind.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-fee 'Aadin iz arsalnaa 'alaihimur reehal 'aqeem

ayahs.textUthmani: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَىْءٍ أَتَتْ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتْهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَىْءٍ أَتَتْ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتْهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ ٤٢
ayahs.textIndopak: مَا تَذَرُ مِنۡ شَىۡءٍ اَتَتۡ عَلَيۡهِ اِلَّا جَعَلَتۡهُ كَالرَّمِيۡمِؕ‏
ayahs.translation: It left nothing of what it came upon but that it made it like disintegrated ruins.
ayahs.transliteration: Maa tazaru min shai'in atat 'alaihi illaa ja'alat-hu karrameem

ayahs.textUthmani: وَفِى ثَمُودَ إِذْ قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَمَتَّعُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفِى ثَمُودَ إِذْ قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَمَتَّعُواْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ ٤٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَفِىۡ ثَمُوۡدَ اِذۡ قِيۡلَ لَهُمۡ تَمَتَّعُوۡا حَتّٰى حِيۡنٍ‏
ayahs.translation: And in Thamūd, when it was said to them, "Enjoy yourselves for a time."
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-fee Samooda iz qeela lahum tamatta''oo hattaa heen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَعَتَوْا۟ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّـٰعِقَةُ وَهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَعَتَوْاْ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّـٰعِقَةُ وَهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ ٤٤
ayahs.textIndopak: فَعَتَوۡا عَنۡ اَمۡرِ رَبِّهِمۡ فَاَخَذَتۡهُمُ الصّٰعِقَةُ وَ هُمۡ يَنۡظُرُوۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: But they were insolent toward the command of their Lord, so the thunderbolt seized them while they were looking on.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa'ataw 'an amri Rabbihim fa-akhazal-humus saa'iqatu Wa-hum yanzuroon

ayahs.textUthmani: فَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ مِن قِيَامٍ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنتَصِرِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُواْ مِن قِيَامٍ وَمَا كَانُواْ مُنتَصِرِينَ ٤٥
ayahs.textIndopak: فَمَا اسۡتَطَاعُوۡا مِنۡ قِيَامٍ وَّمَا كَانُوۡا مُنۡتَصِرِيۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And they were unable to arise, nor could they defend themselves.
ayahs.transliteration: Famas tataa'oo min qiyaaminw Wa-maa kaanoo muntasireen

ayahs.textUthmani: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا فَـٰسِقِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ‌ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُواْ قَوْمًا فَـٰسِقِينَ ٤٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَقَوۡمَ نُوۡحٍ مِّنۡ قَبۡلُ​ؕ اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا قَوۡمًا فٰسِقِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And [We destroyed] the people of Noah before; indeed, they were a people defiantly disobedient.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-qawma Noohim min qablu innahum kaano qawman faasiqeen

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بَنَيْنَـٰهَا بِأَيْي۟دٍ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بَنَيْنَـٰهَا بِأَيْيْدٍ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ ٤٧
ayahs.textIndopak: وَ السَّمَآءَ بَنَيۡنٰهَا بِاَيۡٮدٍ وَّاِنَّا لَمُوۡسِعُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And the heaven We constructed with strength, and indeed, We are [its] expander.
ayahs.transliteration: Wassamaaa'a banainaa-haa bi-aydinw Wa-innaa lamoosi'oon

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱلْأَرْضَ فَرَشْنَـٰهَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْمَـٰهِدُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلْأَرْضَ فَرَشْنَـٰهَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْمَـٰهِدُونَ ٤٨
ayahs.textIndopak: وَالۡاَرۡضَ فَرَشۡنٰهَا فَنِعۡمَ الۡمٰهِدُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And the earth We have spread out, and excellent is the preparer.
ayahs.transliteration: Wal-arda farashnaahaa fani'mal maahidoon

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ ٤٩
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمِنۡ كُلِّ شَىۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَكَّرُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And of all things We created two mates [i.e., counterparts]; perhaps you will remember.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-min kulli shai'in khalaqnaa zawjaini la'allakum tazakkaroon

ayahs.textUthmani: فَفِرُّوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَفِرُّوٓاْ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ‌ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ ٥٠
ayahs.textIndopak: فَفِرُّوۡۤا اِلَى اللّٰهِ​ؕ اِنِّىۡ لَـكُمۡ مِّنۡهُ نَذِيۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ​ۚ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: So flee to Allāh. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.
ayahs.transliteration: Fafirrooo ilal laahi innee lakum minhu nazeerum mubeen

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا تَجْعَلُواْ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ‌ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ ٥١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَا تَجۡعَلُوۡا مَعَ اللّٰهِ اِلٰهًا اٰخَرَ​ؕ اِنِّىۡ لَـكُمۡ مِّنۡهُ نَذِيۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And do not make [as equal] with Allāh another deity. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laa taj'aloo ma'al laahi ilaahan aakhara innee lakum minhu nazeerum mubeen

ayahs.textUthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُوا۟ سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَٲلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُواْ سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ ٥٢
ayahs.textIndopak: كَذٰلِكَ مَاۤ اَتَى الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ مِّنۡ رَّسُوۡلٍ اِلَّا قَالُوۡا سَاحِرٌ اَوۡ مَجۡنُوۡنٌ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Similarly, there came not to those before them any messenger except that they said, "A magician or a madman."
ayahs.transliteration: Kazaalika maaa atal lazeena min qablihim mir Rasoolin illaa qaaloo saahirun aw majnoon

ayahs.textUthmani: أَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِهِۦ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَتَوَاصَوْاْ بِهِۦ‌ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ ٥٣
ayahs.textIndopak: اَتَوَاصَوۡا بِهٖ​ۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ قَوۡمٌ طَاغُوۡنَ​ۚ‏

words.translation: Have they transmitted it to them
Have they transmitted it to them

ayahs.translation: Did they suggest it to them? Rather, they [themselves] are a transgressing people.
ayahs.transliteration: Atawaasaw bih; bal hum qawmun taaghoon

ayahs.textUthmani: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِمَلُومٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِمَلُومٍ ٥٤
ayahs.textIndopak: فَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ فَمَاۤ اَنۡتَ بِمَلُوۡمٍ‏
ayahs.translation: So leave them, [O Muḥammad], for you are not to be blamed.
ayahs.transliteration: Fatawalla 'anhum famaaa anta bimaloom

ayahs.textUthmani: وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ تَنفَعُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ تَنفَعُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ٥٥
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّذَكِّرۡ فَاِنَّ الذِّكۡرٰى تَنۡفَعُ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And remind, for indeed, the reminder benefits the believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-zakkir fa-innaz zikraa tanfa'ul mu'mineen

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ ٱلْجِنَّ وَٱلْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ ٱلْجِنَّ وَٱلْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ ٥٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَا خَلَقۡتُ الۡجِنَّ وَالۡاِنۡسَ اِلَّا لِيَعۡبُدُوۡنِ‏
ayahs.translation: And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maa khalaqtul jinna wal-insa illaa liya'budoon

ayahs.textUthmani: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنْهُم مِّن رِّزْقٍ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطْعِمُونِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنْهُم مِّن رِّزْقٍ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطْعِمُونِ ٥٧
ayahs.textIndopak: مَاۤ اُرِيۡدُ مِنۡهُمۡ مِّنۡ رِّزۡقٍ وَّمَاۤ اُرِيۡدُ اَنۡ يُّطۡعِمُوۡنِ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: I do not want from them any provision, nor do I want them to feed Me.
ayahs.transliteration: Maaa ureedu minhum mir rizqinw Wa-maaa ureedu aien yut'imoon

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلْقُوَّةِ ٱلْمَتِينُ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلْقُوَّةِ ٱلْمَتِينُ ٥٨
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ هُوَ الرَّزَّاقُ ذُو الۡقُوَّةِ الۡمَتِيۡنُ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, it is Allāh who is the [continual] Provider, the firm possessor of strength.
ayahs.transliteration: Innal laaha Huwar Razzaaqu Zul Quwwatil Mateen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ ذَنُوبًا مِّثْلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصْحَـٰبِهِمْ فَلَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ ذَنُوبًا مِّثْلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصْحَـٰبِهِمْ فَلَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ ٥٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاِنَّ لِلَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡا ذَنُوۡبًا مِّثۡلَ ذَنُوۡبِ اَصۡحٰبِهِمۡ فَلَا يَسۡتَعۡجِلُوۡنِ‏

words.translation: so let them not ask Me to hasten
so let them not ask Me to hasten

ayahs.translation: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a portion [of punishment] like the portion of their companions [i.e., predecessors], so let them not impatiently urge Me.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-inna lillazeena zalamoo zanoobam misla zanoobi ashaabihim falaa yasta'jiloon

ayahs.textUthmani: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن يَوْمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِن يَوْمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ ٦٠
ayahs.textIndopak: فَوَيۡلٌ لِّـلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا مِنۡ يَّوۡمِهِمُ الَّذِىۡ يُوۡعَدُوۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And woe to those who have disbelieved from their Day which they are promised.
ayahs.transliteration: Fawailul lillazeena kafaroo mien yawmihimul lazee yoo'adoon
